message:
chore: update TODO.md to reflect completed features

Marked all implemented features as complete:

✅ Messaging Enhancements (fully complete):
- Message replies with thread_id and subject prefix
- Read/ack tools updating timestamps
- Urgent-only filter and ack-required flag handling
- WebP conversion and attachment storage
- Acknowledgement tool

✅ Claims/Leases (mostly complete):
- Glob pattern overlap detection
- release_claims tool
- resource://claims resource endpoint
- Pre-commit hook generator (remaining)

✅ Resources (fully complete):
- resource://message/{id}
- resource://thread/{thread_id}
- resource://inbox/{agent}
- resource://claims/{project}

✅ Search & Summaries (fully complete):
- FTS5 tables and triggers configured
- search_messages tool
- summarize_thread tool

This reflects the current implementation status after recent commits.
